concerns.text: The plan cites 'fancyzhx/dbpedia_14' (a text classification dataset) as the source for both the 'Relational Source' (schema extraction) and 'Graph Source' (entity/relation structure). This dataset contains only text snippets and labels, lacking the explicit schema (tables/columns) or graph topology (edges/nodes) required to simulate SQL joins or graph traversals. The plan assumes this dataset provides structural metadata it does not contain, making the simulation of heterogeneous sources impossible as described.
